name: provenance manifest pr_corpus_state contains a patterns_consulted array per the contract
command: printf '{"pr_corpus_state":{"x":{"patterns_consulted":["p1","p2"],"last_fetch":"t","freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","evidence_count_used":3}}}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check pr-corpus 2>out.txt && grep -q 'patterns_consulted_count=2' out.txt && grep -q 'evidence_count_used=3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
